goal: Better mental health support for students

idea.description: A community-driven online platform connecting students with local, peer-led mental health support groups and workshops, offering resources for affordable therapy sessions and promoting sustainable wellness practices.
idea.revenue_model: Commission-based services from partnered therapy providers and wellness service vendors.
idea.novelty_explanation: Distinguishes itself by prioritizing social connections over algorithmic recommendations, creating a more nuanced approach to mental health support.

goal: Better mental health support for students

idea.description: A wearable device that tracks students' mental health through biometric data and provides personalized insights, while powering a small solar panel to charge the device using kinetic energy from daily movements.
idea.revenue_model: Subscription-based model offering premium features and personalized coaching for students and educators.
idea.novelty_explanation: EcoMind combines wearable technology with sustainable energy harvesting to provide holistic mental health support, distinguishing it from generic wellness apps.
